zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Arundell I於大約1272年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親Sir Renfred Arundell28歲，母親Alice de Lanherne31歲。他於1289年與Joan Soor在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1307年在英國可瓦爾聖 艾萬享年36歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾。

zh-hans.St Ervan, Cornwall, England: 英国可瓦爾聖 艾萬

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Arundell I于大约1272年出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲Sir Renfred Arundell28岁，母亲Alice de Lanherne31岁。他于1289年与Joan Soor在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1307年在英国可瓦爾聖 艾萬享年36岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Arundell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Arundel
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Arundell I was born about 1272, in Cornwall, England, his father, Sir Renfred Arundell, was 28 and his mother, Alice de Lanherne, was 31. He married Joan Soor in 1289, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1307, in St Ervan, Cornwall, England, at the age of 36, and was buried in Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Arundell I est né environ 1272, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir Renfred Arundell, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice de Lanherne, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Joan Soor en 1289, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1307, à St Ervan, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Arundell I um 1272 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Renfred Arundell 28 und seine Mutter Alice de Lanherne 31. Er hat 1289 in Cornwall, England Joan Soor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1307 im Alter von 36 Jahren in St Ervan, Cornwall, England und wurde in Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Arundell I è nato il circa 1272 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Sir Renfred Arundell, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Lanherne, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Joan Soor nel 1289, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1307, nel St Ervan, Cornwall, England, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell Iが約1272年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Sir Renfred Arundellは28歳，母Alice de Lanherneは31歳であった。1289年にイギリスコルンワルでJoan Soorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1307年にイギリスコルンワルスト エルヴァンで36歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell I(이)가 대략 1272년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Renfred Arundell(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Lanherne(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1289년 영국 코른월에서 Joan Soor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1307년 영국 코른월 스트 르반에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월에 묻혔다.

mn.Of, Lanherne, Cornwall, England: Lanherne, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Arundell I nasceu aproximadamente 1272, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Renfred Arundell, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Lanherne, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Soor em 1289, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1307, em St Ervan, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Arundell I родился около 1272 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Renfred Arundell было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Lanherne, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Soor в 1289 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1307 г. в местности ст эрван, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Arundell I nació aproximadamente 1272, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Renfred Arundell, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Alice de Lanherne, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Joan Soor en 1289, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1307, en St Ervan, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Cornwall, Inglaterra.
